name: MRA Grant Application Template

sections.name: general_audience_abstract
sections.title: General Audience Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a non-technical summary of your project that is understandable to a general audience.

sections.name: technical_abstract
sections.title: Technical Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a concise technical summary of your project, including the scientific aims and potential impact.

sections.name: keywords
sections.title: Keywords
sections.instructions: Provide a list of keywords relevant to your project. These keywords will help MRA categorize your proposal.

sections.name: background_and_specific_aims
sections.title: Background and Specific Aims
sections.instructions: Provide the necessary background information for your research project. Clearly state the specific aims and objectives of the proposed research.

sections.name: preliminary_data
sections.title: Preliminary Data
sections.instructions: Present any preliminary data that supports your proposed research.  Include information on previous work that justifies your research plan. This section is not applicable to all grant types.

sections.name: experimental_design_and_methods
sections.title: Experimental Design and Methods
sections.instructions: Detail the experimental design, methods, and procedures you will use to achieve the stated aims of the project. Be specific about techniques and materials used. Detail all methods for data collection, management and analysis.

sections.name: statistical_plan
sections.title: Statistical Plan
sections.instructions: Describe the statistical methods and analyses you will use to evaluate the results of your project. Include information about sample sizes and power calculations.

sections.name: rationale_and_impact
sections.title: Rationale and Impact
sections.instructions: Explain how your proposed research aligns with MRA's mission, and describe the potential impact of your work on melanoma prevention, detection, diagnosis, and/or treatment. Explain the potential for clinical translation.

sections.name: budget_summary
sections.title: Budget Summary
sections.instructions: Provide a summary of your budget, including the total amount requested from MRA and any matching funds from industry partners (if applicable). Ensure your budget aligns with the funding limits for your chosen award mechanism.

sections.name: budget_justification
sections.title: Budget Justification
sections.instructions: Provide a detailed explanation and justification for each item in your budget, including personnel, supplies, equipment, and other costs, including data sharing policy costs. For Academic-Industry Partnership, detail all contributions.

sections.name: current_and_pending_support
sections.title: Current and Pending Support
sections.instructions: List all current and pending sources of funding for the PI and key personnel on the project, as applicable to the award type, and explain any overlap with this application.

sections.name: mra_portfolio_fit
sections.title: MRA Portfolio Fit
sections.instructions: Briefly describe how the proposed research project fits within MRA's overall research portfolio.

sections.name: clinical_trial_protocol
sections.title: Clinical Trial Protocol Synopsis
sections.instructions: If applicable, include a brief protocol synopsis (5 pages maximum), along with a timeline and milestones, including IRB and regulatory approvals, patient accrual timeline, and timeline for completion of analyses.
